location: Inside a chest at the trebuchet-guarded camp on Bellum Highway, between the East Raya Lucaria Gate and the Grand Lift of Dectus, in Liurnia of the Lakes.

source.name: chest at the Bellum Highway trebuchet camp

tactics: Approach from either East Raya Lucaria Gate (south) or Grand Lift of Dectus (north) along Bellum Highway; the camp has Cuckoo Knights and footsoldiers guarding a siege trebuchet that fires on you from range.
The chest containing the Great Mace sits on the east side of the camp — clear or sneak past the guards before looting.
Stay mindful of the trebuchet's ranged bombardment while crossing the open road toward the chest.
lore: An oversized bludgeon studded with sharp protrusions, essentially a scaled-up mace. It keeps every advantage of its smaller cousin while hitting far harder against both flesh and enemy guards.

builds.name: Pure Strength stance-breaker
builds.why: C-scaling Strength and strong guard-boost stats make it a solid pure-Str pick focused on breaking enemy poise, with the Endure skill letting you trade hits without being staggered mid-combo.
